creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
The port graphics/opencolorio fails to build during package phase with missing files using poudriere on FreeBSD 13.2-STABLE 1302505 amd64.

Below is the build log of the error of the missing files:

===>  Building package for opencolorio-2.1.3_1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/opencolorio/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/opencolorio/html/_static/sphinx_press_theme.css:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/opencolorio/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/opencolorio/html/_static/theme-vendors.js:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
